characters.appearance: A man in his 30s with a medium build and medium complexion. He has short, neatly styled dark hair and clean facial features. He appears energetic and expressive.
characters.wardrobe: He wears a white, knee-length kurta over a white lower garment. A light beige shawl is draped over his left shoulder. He has a dark watch on his left wrist.
characters.demeanor: Confident, motivational, and engaging, speaking directly to an audience with active hand gestures.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: क्या आपको लगता है कि English बोलना सीखना बहुत मुश्किल है? [Do you think learning to speak English is very difficult?]
Character A says: बिल्कुल नहीं! जब बाकी लोग confidence से बोल सकते हैं, तो आप क्यों नहीं? [Not at all! When others can speak with confidence, then why can't you?]
Character A says: बस एक बात याद रखना, हार नहीं माननी है। [Just remember one thing, you must not give up.]
Character A says: रोज़ थोड़ा समय निकालो। [Take out a little time every day.]
Character A says: Supernova app के AI Tutor के साथ रोज़ practice करो, और खुद में change देखो। [Practice daily with Supernova app's AI Tutor, and see the change in yourself.]
Character A says: चाहे interview हो या office की meeting, आप भी confident बनोगे। [Whether it's an interview or an office meeting, you will also become confident.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Hooks the viewer by challenging their doubts about learning English.
- Replaces the competitor's unrealistic '7 days' claim with a practical, encouraging message.
- Introduces the Supernova app and its core AI Tutor feature.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
SUPERNOVA TALK
क्या आपको लगता है कि
English बोलना सीखना
बहुत मुश्किल है?
बिल्कुल नहीं!
जब बाकी लोग confidence
से बोल सकते हैं,
तो आप क्यों नहीं?
बस एक बात याद रखना,
हार नहीं माननी है।
रोज़ थोड़ा समय निकालो।
Supernova app के
AI Tutor के साथ
रोज़ practice करो,
और खुद में change देखो।

scenes.supernova_script: Character A says: अगर आप सोच रहे हो कि सिर्फ Instagram scroll करके या YouTube देखकर English बोलना सीख जाओगे, तो ये एक वहम है। [If you are thinking that you will learn to speak English just by scrolling Instagram or watching YouTube, then this is an illusion.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Calls out the ineffective habit of passive scrolling.
- Creates a relatable problem statement for the learner.
- Sets up the transition to active practice.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
अगर आप सोच रहे हो कि
Instagram scroll करके या
YouTube देखकर
English बोलना सीख जाओगे,
तो ये एक वहम है।

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: सच कहूँ तो, सिर्फ videos देखने से speaking नहीं आती। [To tell the truth, you don't learn speaking just by watching videos.]
Character A says: English बोलने के लिए, English बोलनी पड़ती है! [To speak English, you have to actually speak English!]
Character A says: इसलिए अगर सच में English बोलना सीखना है, तो इधर-उधर भटकना बंद करो। [So if you really want to learn to speak English, stop wandering around.]
Character A says: आज ही Supernova app इस्तेमाल करना शुरू करो। [Start using the Supernova app from today itself.]
Character A says: रोज़ real-world situations की practice करो। [Practice real-world situations every day.]
Character A says: अपनी झिझक को दूर करो और खुद को better बनाओ। [Overcome your hesitation and make yourself better.]
Character A says: ताकि आप भी शान से कह सको, "Yes, I can speak English!" [So that you can also say with pride, "Yes, I can speak English!"]
Character A says: तो देर किस बात की? अभी Install Now पर click करो और Supernova app download करो। [So what are you waiting for? Click on Install Now right away and download the Supernova app.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Shifts the focus from passive video watching to active speaking practice.
- Highlights Supernova's real-world situation practice feature.
- Delivers an empowering Call to Action to download the app.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
SUPERNOVA TALK
सच कहूँ तो,
सिर्फ videos देखने से
speaking नहीं आती।
English बोलने के लिए,
English बोलनी पड़ती है!
इसलिए अगर सच में
English बोलना सीखना है,
तो इधर-उधर भटकना बंद करो।
आज ही Supernova app
इस्तेमाल करना शुरू करो।
रोज़ real-world situations
की practice करो।
ताकि आप भी शान से कह सको,
Yes, I can speak English!
अभी Install Now पर click करो
और Supernova app download करो।

scenes.supernova_script: Character A says: अभी Install Now पर click करो और Supernova app download करो। [Click on Install Now right away and download the Supernova app.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Reinforces the final Call to Action.
- Pairs the audio instruction with a clear visual app download cue.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
supernova
अभी Install Now पर click करके
Supernova app
download करो।

scenes.scene_summary:
- Provides necessary legal disclaimers.
- Sets realistic expectations regarding individual effort and outcomes.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text: Supernova kisi bhi government authority, institution, brand, organisation ya individual ke dwara endorsed, sponsored, affiliated ya associated nahi hai. Outcomes individual effort aur practice par depend karte hain aur vary kar sakte hain.
